groupings.title: Setup
groupings.description: One-time project initialization. Run /asome-setup once per project to discover GitHub Project constants and write .asome/config.json — required by all other board-aware skills.

groupings.title: SDD Workflow
groupings.description: Spec-Driven Development for ASOME projects. Mandatory for Feature, Improvement, and Setup issues. Defines when SDD is required, maps SDD phases to board stages, and provides the full command sequence.

groupings.title: Dev Workflow
groupings.description: Skills for the ASOME day-to-day development cycle: issues, commits, branches, PRs, code review, and environment promotion.

groupings.title: Infrastructure
groupings.description: Skills for ASOME infrastructure: bootstrapping from canonical patterns, auditing against best practices, analyzing AWS costs, and safely applying Terraform changes.

groupings.title: Sprint & Board
groupings.description: Skills for managing the ASOME sprint board, tracking velocity, and generating daily standups.

groupings.title: Design System
groupings.description: Skills for generating design system documentation and component specs for ASOME Lab projects.
